content:
I think that we should put the roc-lang repos all in the same github topic. I think either we should chose roc or roc-lang. I personally would prefer roc, but it is also used by some libraries that deal with Receiver Operator Characteristic (ROC) curves. So it would just be a less pure github topic.

If we instead use roc-lang, it looks to be a pure topic that would only be used by us.

I think doing this overall all should give a cool list of repos that people can look at related to roc.
By starting with the official repos, I think it would make it clearer what github topic we use. That way, hopefully most roc libraries in general can all have the same topic. Thoughts?
we also already have some projects using the roc-lang topic: https://github.com/topics/roc-lang
I've added it where I could, can someone with access do github.com/roc-lang/unicode and github.com/roc-lang/rbt ?
I added a few of my repositories too. I've skipped a few that are very experimental and immature. TIL about github topics :smile:
Cool. I'll update some of my repos from roc to roc-lang
